title: Date-Night Canadian Tahini Paste Ss09-wrap
description: A sweet and savory jammy dish featuring Canadian-inspired flavors, wrapped in a crispy ssam-wrap. Perfect for a date night in, this dish is low in calories but rich in flavors.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together tahini paste, honey, lemon juice, and olive oil until smooth.
Add crushed garlic and minced fresh dill to the bowl and whisk until combined.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the ssam-wrap to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, toast the feta cheese in a toaster or under the broiler until lightly browned.
Slice the fresh dates in half and set aside.
To assemble the ssam-wrap, lay a large sheet of ssam-wrap flat on a work surface.
Spread the tahini paste mixture evenly over the center of the ssam-wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top the tahini paste with toasted feta cheese, sliced dates, and a sprinkle of salt.
Fold the bottom edge of the ssam-wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the ssam-wrap into a neat cylinder.
Slice the ssam-wrap in half and serve immediately.
